title: The Red Ranger and the Mage
overview: Yihdra is the brilliant child of a disgraced court mage, who seeks to redeem her family's reputation and use sorcery for good. But when she meets an adventurer who transforms into an all-red suit wielding otherworldly weapons, it could be the first step in achieving her dream... or it could drive her crazy!

title: A Red Ranger and Adventurers
overview: Yihdra has become an adventurer to learn more about Togo and his powers, but after an adventuring duo earns her hatred with some rude remarks about her father, it escalates into a race to see who can clear a dungeon first.

title: The Red Ranger, the Hero, and the Princess
overview: Teltina, is the third princess of the kingdom of Avallost, joined by her Hero, Lowji. She is on a crusade to combat a threat to the people, and eager to recruit Yihdra and Togo, but her knight in shining armor isn't quite as enthusiastic...

title: The Red Ranger and the Blades of Bonds
overview: A Mana Seed-empowered lord is oppressing his citizens, so it's up to Togo and his friends to stop him.

title: The Red Ranger and the Demon Queen's Children
overview: Togo and his friends are brought to the Sorcery Tower, headquarters of Yihdra's rival.

title: The Red Ranger and the Mage's Dream
overview: While Princess Teltina recovers, Red and Yihdra focus their efforts on investigating mana seeds and mana metal.

title: The Red Ranger and the Sun Forest
overview: Red and the group set off on a mission to investigate the elves who live in a forest in the middle of a desert.

title: The Red Ranger and Bondkiller
overview: Raniya frets about confronting Azir, so Red shares a story about when he had to battle a friend of his own.

title: The Red Ranger and the Mental Mask
overview: Red and his friends confront Azir, whose despotic conquest threatens the Sun Forest.

title: The Red Ranger and the Mask of Pain
overview: A newly empowered Azir faces off against Red and his friends, and the odds don't look good.

title: The Red Ranger and a New Power
overview: Azir becomes a rampaging sandstorm, forcing Red and the others to fight a literal force of nature.

title: Kizuna Black
overview: Togo unleashes a forbidden power to save his friends, but it may end up costing him everything in exchange.
